description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

summary: Add TechOps Services As Keeper Provider And Remove Deactivated Networks
description: Adds TechOps Services as a keeper provider operating the SKY lane in dss-cron, removes the deactivated Gelato Network and Keep3r Network documents, and updates the Keepers parent document to better describe keeper responsibilities.
